rows.proves: Qwen live fallback is configured and passed all four fallback checks on this host.
rows.does_not_prove: Other providers, IDE harness projection, or account-free consumer support.

rows.proves: Configured Qwen provider passed and unconfigured providers skipped cleanly.
Docker/headless service worker can self-test, submit a local task, process it, drain the queue, and keep artifacts.
rows.does_not_prove: Provider-backed Codex/Claude execution or remote cloud worker support.

rows.proves: Host Codex provider execution can be invoked through the service-control-plane adapter with explicit opt-in and supported model pin.
rows.does_not_prove: Claude provider execution, container credential inheritance, remote ingress, VM, Kubernetes, or unconfigured providers.
